caption.full:
Mara Wilson discusses a potential Matilda sequel.

Mara Wilson spoke about the possibility of a Matilda 2 sequel while attending the Fanboy Expo. She expressed reservations about a plot involving Matilda's daughter, believing the character's powers stem from adversity. Wilson now views Matilda as a role model, a shift from her past annoyance with the association.

What do you think about a Matilda sequel?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

youtube.title: Mara Wilson: Matilda Sequel Possible, No Daughter Plot
youtube.description:
Mara Wilson discussed the potential for a sequel to the 1996 film Matilda at Fanboy Expo. Wilson stated that a Matilda 2 sequel could be possible but expressed reservations about a plot involving Matilda's daughter. She now sees Matilda as a role model who shares values like advocating for mental health and supporting public libraries.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
